mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorite_folders (user_id, name, description, is_public, is_default, movie_count, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{isPublic}, #{isDefault}, #{movieCount}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
UPDATE favorite_folders
name = #{name},
description = #{description},
is_public = #{isPublic},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, is_public, is_default, movie_count, TO_CHAR(create_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as create_time, TO_CHAR(update_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as update_time FROM favorite_folders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorite_folders WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE favorite_folders SET movie_count = #{count} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE favorite_folders SET movie_count = movie_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE favorite_folders SET movie_count = movie_count + #{count} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE favorite_folders SET movie_count = movie_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND movie_count > 0
UPDATE favorite_folders SET movie_count = GREATEST(movie_count - #{count}, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorite_folders WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id, user_id, name, description, is_public, is_default, movie_count, create_time, update_time FROM favorite_folders WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorite_folders (user_id, name, description, is_public, is_default, movie_count, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{isPublic}, 1, #{movieCount}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
